name: Hygiene Foundation
description: Purge tracked .venv/, dist/, __pycache__/ from git index. Complete .gitignore with missing entries (.coverage, .pytest_cache/, htmlcov/). Add Apache 2.0 LICENSE file. Pin anthropic<1.0 upper bound in pyproject.toml.

All 278 existing tests still pass: pytest tests/ exits 0

name: LLM Annotator Refactor + Helper Tests
description: Extract _parse_claude_response() shared helper from duplicated parsing logic in annotate_trial_claude_code and _annotate_one_claude_code. Create realistic CLI envelope fixtures (5+ variants). Write contract tests BEFORE extraction, then verify after. Test pure helpers (_read_text, _load_json, _resolve_model_alias, _resolve_model_api). Fix _taxonomy_yaml() hardcoded filename to use load_taxonomy() or module constant. Add taxonomy cache reset fixture in conftest.py. Create shared conftest.py with taxonomy fixtures for use by Phase 2 agents.
acceptance: A function _parse_claude_response exists in llm_annotator.py
annotate_trial_claude_code calls _parse_claude_response instead of inline parsing
_annotate_one_claude_code calls _parse_claude_response instead of inline parsing

tests/fixtures/ directory contains at least 5 claude_envelope_*.json files covering: structured_output, raw fallback, is_error, code fences, empty result
Contract tests for _parse_claude_response pass (test parsing structured_output, raw JSON, is_error, bad JSON, empty result)
Tests for _read_text, _load_json, _resolve_model_alias, _resolve_model_api all pass
_taxonomy_yaml() no longer hardcodes 'taxonomy_v1.yaml' string literal
tests/conftest.py exists with shared taxonomy fixtures and cache reset
All existing 278+ tests still pass
pytest tests/test_llm_annotator.py passes with no failures

name: CLI Test Coverage >= 70%
description: Write comprehensive tests for all 8 cmd_* functions in cli.py via direct function calls with argparse.Namespace and tmp_path. Test error paths (missing file, invalid JSON) with pytest.raises(SystemExit). Test cmd_llm_annotate sampling/assembly with mocked annotate_trial_llm. Test cmd_extract warns/exits non-zero when 0 trials found. Target >= 70% coverage on cli module.
acceptance: pytest tests/test_cli.py --cov=agent_diagnostics.cli --cov-report=term shows >= 70% coverage
Tests exist for all 8 cmd_* functions (cmd_extract, cmd_annotate, cmd_llm_annotate, cmd_blend, cmd_report, cmd_calibrate, cmd_classify, cmd_validate)
Error paths tested: missing file, invalid JSON, missing directory causes SystemExit
cmd_llm_annotate tested with mocked annotate_trial_llm
